name: Structured Content Extractor
description: Structured content extraction workflow. Takes content and extracts structured data based on configured extraction type (e.g., audience extraction).

gettingStarted.title: What is Structured Content Extractor?
gettingStarted.howItWorks: Provide the content to analyze. The agent will extract relevant structured information based on the configured extraction type, presenting it in an organized, machine-readable format.
gettingStarted.whatIsItFor: The Structured Content Extractor analyzes content and extracts specific structured information such as audience characteristics, key themes, or other data points in a standardized format.

inputs.label: Content to Analyze
inputs.description: Provide the content you want to extract information from
inputs.placeholder: Enter or paste your content here...

inputs.label: Ground with context
inputs.description: Optionally select artifacts or knowledge to provide additional context

inputs.label: Add more context
inputs.description: Please add any documents to analyze

schemas.name: Audience Extraction Schema

audience_needs.description: Summary of the key needs, questions, or expectations the document addresses for its audience

intended_audience.description: A concise description of the document's primary target audience

location.description: Geographical location or region relevant to the audience

age_range.description: Age range of the audience (e.g., '18-25', 'all ages')

interests.description: Main interests or fields relevant to the audience

professional_background.description: Relevant professional or educational background (e.g., students, engineers, general public)

audience_characteristics.description: Demographic and other relevant characteristics defining the audience

schemas.description: Schema for extracting audience information from content

htmlTemplates.name: Audience Extraction Template
htmlTemplates.template:
Audience Analysis

Intended Audience

{{intended_audience}}

Audience Characteristics

Age Range:
{{audience_characteristics.age_range}}
Location:
{{audience_characteristics.location}}
Interests:
    {{#each audience_characteristics.interests}}
  • {{this}}
    • {{/each}}
Professional Background:
{{audience_characteristics.professional_background}}

Audience Needs

{{audience_needs}}

config.messageTemplate:
Analyze the following content and extract the requested structured information.
  
  Content to analyze:
  {userMessage}
  
  Instructions:
  - Carefully read and analyze the content
  - Extract information according to the structured format
  - Be precise and thorough in your analysis
  - If information is not explicitly stated, make reasonable inferences based on context
  - Ensure all required fields are populated

config.systemPrompt: You are an expert content analyst. Extract structured information from the provided content with precision and accuracy.
